source: User request: local GitHub workflow running for faster feedback. Run: LINEAR_API_KEY=xxx node scripts/linear/create-issues.mjs --input docs/backlog/local-github-workflow-tickets.json --team-key ANM

tickets.title: [X Platform] Run GitHub Actions workflows locally for faster feedback loops
tickets.description:
## Summary
Enable running CI workflows (e.g. .github/workflows/ci.yml, deploy-preflight.yml) locally so developers get faster feedback without pushing to a branch.

## Options
- **act** (nektos/act): runs GitHub Actions in Docker locally
- **Other**: custom script that mirrors workflow steps, or nx/verify as lightweight proxy

## Acceptance criteria
- Document and/or automate local workflow execution (e.g. `make ci-local` or `act -j platform`)
- Reduce time-to-feedback for CI failures (run before push)
- Integrate with existing scripts/verify where possible

## Validation
- Run equivalent of CI platform/apps/docs jobs locally and get same pass/fail signal
